failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS publication_id, p.description
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'Japanese & restaurant & (sushi | ramen | sushi | sashimi | tempura | udon | yakitori)')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'Japanese & restaurant & (sushi | ramen | sushi | sashimi | tempura | udon | yakitori)')) DESC, p.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
